text:
1. Strong Python proficiency for developing scalable backend systems, automation workflows, and AI-driven applications in production environments
2. Experience designing and maintaining RESTful APIs using FastAPI or Flask with authentication, validation, rate limiting, and asynchronous request handling
3. Ability to architect modular backend systems with clean service separation, reusable components, and maintainable project structures
4. Hands-on experience building machine learning pipelines including preprocessing, feature engineering, training, evaluation, and inference optimization
5. Familiarity with semantic search systems, vector embeddings, and retrieval-based architectures for intelligent recommendation or matching platforms
6. Strong understanding of SQL and relational database optimization including indexing, query tuning, schema normalization, and transaction management
7. Experience processing and transforming large-scale CSV, JSON, and structured datasets using efficient data engineering practices
8. Ability to implement logging, observability, exception handling, timeout strategies, and retry mechanisms for production-grade reliability
9. Knowledge of Linux-based deployment environments, shell scripting, virtual environments, and dependency management for backend services
10. Experience integrating third-party APIs, handling asynchronous workflows, and managing external service communication securely and efficiently
11. Understanding of software performance optimization techniques including latency reduction, batching, caching, and memory-efficient processing
12. Familiarity with containerization technologies such as Docker for environment consistency, deployment portability, and scalable application packaging
13. Experience using Git-based collaborative workflows including branching strategies, pull requests, code reviews, and version control best practices
14. Ability to develop automation systems for operational efficiency including scheduled workflows, data validation, and reporting pipelines
15. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to debug distributed systems, identify bottlenecks, and improve system scalability under production workloads
